steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage describes a price rise that had a "counterintuitive effect of ______ demand." Buyers flooded the market expecting further price increases. The blank must name what the price rise did to demand — it drew out or produced new demand from buyers who hadn't previously wanted the cards.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "capitalizing": means taking advantage of something for personal gain. Demand itself cannot capitalize on anything. ✗
  • "exploiting": means using something unfairly for one's own benefit. Demand is not exploited by a price rise. ✗
  • "eliciting": means drawing out or calling forth. The price rise called forth new demand from buyers who hadn't previously been interested — exactly what the passage describes. ✓
  • "satisfying": means fulfilling or meeting demand. The passage says demand increased, not that it was fulfilled. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
